An implant created by the ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], the '''Sith regenerator''' stimulated cell replication of its "host," allowing them to heal. [[Spy/Legends|Spies]] were often equipped with such devices as being behind enemy lines prevented them from seeking medical treatment.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
